name: coolmaster-platform
description: Enterprise HVAC booking, CRM, scheduling, chat, analytics, and mobile platform.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run start:dev -w apps/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.lint: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/api
scripts.render:build: npm install && npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run prisma:deploy -w apps/api && npm run prisma:seed -w apps/api
scripts.netlify:build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/web
